prompt.content:
Using the the model, calculate the Shareholder Equity Value Creation in $ under the following assumptions:

Assumptions 
1) For S&P Global use the closing share price as of 1/8/2026 for SPGI share price
2) For S&P Global, S&P Mobility and RemainCo use the 5-year treasury rate as of 1/8/2026 as your risk-free rate
3) For the period 2026 to 2030 decrease non-subscription/transaction revenue growth by 175 bps each year from current values for S&P Mobility
4) For the period 2026 to 2030 decrease depreciation and amortization % of revenue by one third each year from current values for S&P Mobility
5) For the period 2026 to 2030 increase the dis-synergy costs by 750bps each year from current values for S&P Mobility 
6) Use beta of 1.207 for S&P Global and RemainCo 
7) For S&P Global use EBITDA multiple of 21.7x
8) Use EBITDA multiple approach to calculate total enterprise value for S&P Global, S&P Mobility and RemainCo 
9) Round to two decimals and present data in $ millions

rubrics.name: States Shareholder Equity Value Creation is -$15,130.88 (acceptable range... (ver_005b48d44f134b9894477489d0bdece1)

messages.content: States Shareholder Equity Value Creation is -$15,130.88 (acceptable range $-15,282.19 to $-14,979.57).
